yesterdayAnalysis: Tuesday's double session was textbook race week execution: 2,000yd pool swim at easy aerobic intensity (HR 104) followed by a 3-mile easy run (HR 120). Both sessions kept you in Zone 1-2, allowing neural patterns to stay sharp without adding fatigue. The HR data confirms you're truly holding back — exactly what's needed 5 days out from Oregon.
todayRecommendation: Complete today's 1,000m open water swim as planned — this is your final confidence builder before race day. Keep it truly easy, focus on sighting practice, and confirm your wetsuit/goggle setup feels dialed. This is about mental readiness, not fitness.
weekProgress: Week 13 of 13 shows 59 TSS through Tuesday — perfectly on-track for a race week taper. No heavy bike or brick sessions are planned this week, which is appropriate 4 days from racing. Execution has been disciplined and precise.
